studyName: Comparative Analysis of Primary and Metastatic Colorectal Cancer

tables.description: Sample ID, body site, analyte type, tumor status, histological type of sample, primary or metastatic tumor, and primary tumor location of participants with primary and metastatic colorectal cancer lesions and involved in the "Comparative Sequence Analysis Between Primary and Metastatic Colorectal Cancer Lesions" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, source subject ID, and affection status of participants with primary and metastatic colorectal cancer lesions and involved in the "Comparative Sequence Analysis Between Primary and Metastatic Colorectal Cancer Lesions" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with primary and metastatic colorectal cancer lesions and involved in the "Comparative Sequence Analysis Between Primary and Metastatic Colorectal Cancer Lesions" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository
